title: elymus mollis subsp. interior
intro: Elymus mollis subsp. interior, commonly known as interior smooth wild rye or prairie wild rye, is a subspecies of grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elymus mollis subsp. interior include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable plant for herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Elymus mollis subsp. interior typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the roots or leaves of the plant.
